# daytona_suspend_organization (Action)

Suspends a Daytona organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_suspend_organization" "example" {
  config {
    organization_id                       = "organization-id"
    reason                                = "billing"
    until                                 = "2026-12-31T23:59:59Z"
    suspension_cleanup_grace_period_hours = 24
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID.
- `reason` (String) Reason for suspending the Daytona organization.
- `until` (String) RFC3339 timestamp for when the Daytona organization suspension ends.

### Optional

- `suspension_cleanup_grace_period_hours` (Number) Optional suspension cleanup grace period in hours.
